description: Perform a Customer Cohort Analysis in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. Build a retention matrix (Pivot Table) that groups customers by their acquisition year and shows their activity over subsequent years. Create calculations for 'Acquisition Date' (representing the first order date for each customer) and 'Acquisition Year'. The Pivot Table must feature 'Acquisition Year' as rows, 'Order Date' (Year) as columns, and a distinct count of 'Customer Name' as values. Apply heatmap conditional formatting to the visualization and save the workbook as 'Customer_Cohort_Matrix'.
